case_title: JAMES RICHARDS ET AL VS. 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGMENT SATISFIED PER PLAINTIFF JAMES RICHARDS SIGNATURE VERIFICATION DATED 12/9/15 AS TO DEFENDANT 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDS, JAMES YU, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC $370.20 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $480.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.20 FILED BY RICHARDS, JAMES YU, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00 - SERVED OCT-01-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF NANCY YU WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY F. W. MAINZER--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.
